rationale: Chemistry at L3 follows the journal-section structure of JACS, Angewandte, Nature Chemistry: methodology areas (C-H activation, photocatalysis), target classes (natural products, peptides), and characterization (ultrafast spectroscopy, mass spec methods). I deliberately split out heterogeneous from homogeneous catalysis since they're separate research communities, and kept electrochemistry split between fundamental (electron transfer, mechanism) and energy applications.

subfields.name: Total Synthesis of Natural Products
subfields.tagline: Complex molecule synthesis, target-driven methodology development.

subfields.name: Synthetic Methodology
subfields.tagline: New reactions, C-H functionalization, cross-coupling methodology.

subfields.name: Asymmetric Catalysis (Organic)
subfields.tagline: Chiral catalysts, organocatalysis, asymmetric methodology.

subfields.name: Photoredox & Radical Chemistry
subfields.tagline: Photoredox catalysis, radical methodology, EDA complexes.

subfields.name: Peptide & Bioconjugate Chemistry
subfields.tagline: Peptide synthesis, bioconjugation, click chemistry applications.

subfields.name: Main-Group & f-Block Chemistry
subfields.tagline: Main-group, lanthanide, actinide chemistry, novel bonding.

subfields.name: Organometallic Chemistry
subfields.tagline: Metal-ligand design, catalysis mechanism (metals), small molecule activation.

subfields.name: Coordination Chemistry
subfields.tagline: Coordination complex synthesis, magnetism in complexes, single-molecule magnets.

subfields.name: Bioinorganic Chemistry
subfields.tagline: Metalloproteins, model complexes, biomimetic catalysis.

subfields.name: Ultrafast & Time-Resolved Spectroscopy
subfields.tagline: Femtosecond methods, 2D IR, transient absorption, photochemistry dynamics.

subfields.name: Chemical Dynamics & Reaction Theory
subfields.tagline: Reaction dynamics, surface dynamics, energy transfer theory.

subfields.name: Surface Science & Interfaces
subfields.tagline: Surface chemistry, in-situ surface, electrochemical interfaces, model catalysis.

subfields.name: Mass Spectrometry Methods & Proteomics Chemistry
subfields.tagline: MS instrumentation, ion mobility, top-down proteomics methodology.

subfields.name: NMR & Magnetic Resonance Methods
subfields.tagline: Solid-state NMR, DNP, NMR sequence development.

subfields.name: Chemical Sensors & Detection
subfields.tagline: Optical sensors, electrochemical sensors, single-molecule detection.

subfields.name: Heterogeneous Catalysis
subfields.tagline: Single-atom catalysts, supported metals, zeolites, methodology.

subfields.name: Homogeneous Catalysis (Mechanism)
subfields.tagline: Mechanism studies, ligand design, well-defined catalysts.

subfields.name: Biocatalysis & Enzyme Engineering
subfields.tagline: Directed evolution, engineered enzymes, cascade biocatalysis.

subfields.name: CO2 Reduction & Electrocatalysis
subfields.tagline: CO2RR catalysts, electrochemical N2 reduction, oxygen evolution.

subfields.name: Battery Electrochemistry
subfields.tagline: Li-ion mechanism, solid-state, Na/K, lithium-metal interface.

subfields.name: Fuel Cells & Electrolyzers
subfields.tagline: PEM, alkaline, AEM fuel cells; water electrolysis chemistry.

subfields.name: Fundamental Electrochemistry & Mechanism
subfields.tagline: Electron-transfer mechanism, electrochemical interfaces theory.

subfields.name: Controlled Polymerization
subfields.tagline: RAFT, ATRP, ROMP, complex architecture polymers.

subfields.name: Self-Assembly & Supramolecular Polymers
subfields.tagline: Block copolymer self-assembly, supramolecular polymers.

subfields.name: Sustainable & Biodegradable Polymers
subfields.tagline: Bio-based monomers, recyclable polymers, degradable plastics.

subfields.name: DFT & Electronic Structure Methods
subfields.tagline: DFT methods development, hybrid functionals, density-matrix methods.

subfields.name: Molecular Dynamics & Simulation Methods
subfields.tagline: Enhanced sampling, polarizable FFs, QM/MM, free energy methods.

subfields.name: ML & Neural Potentials for Chemistry
subfields.tagline: Neural potentials, generative chemistry models, ML-MD.

subfields.name: Drug-Target Medicinal Chemistry
subfields.tagline: Kinase chemistry, GPCR chemistry, target-class medchem.

subfields.name: PROTACs & Molecular Glues
subfields.tagline: Targeted protein degradation, E3 ligase recruiters, molecular glues.

subfields.name: Green Process Chemistry
subfields.tagline: Continuous flow, mechanochemistry, green metrics, biomass valorization.

subfields.name: Atmospheric & Aquatic Chemistry
subfields.tagline: Atmospheric aerosols, aqueous chemistry, secondary chemistry, PFAS fate.

subfields.name: MOFs, COFs & Porous Materials Chemistry
subfields.tagline: MOF/COF synthesis, gas adsorption, porous catalysis.

subfields.name: Molecular Machines & Cages
subfields.tagline: Molecular machines, mechanostereochemistry, host-guest cages.

uncovered_concerns: Photochemistry could be its own leaf — folds under photoredox (organic) or ultrafast spectroscopy (physical).
Polymer applications (membranes, coatings) tend to live in Materials Science L1; pure polymer chemistry lives here.
